release_title: GoalOS AGIALPHA Ascension Sovereign Machine Economy Kernel v3 ⚙️✨
tagline: The executable proof-to-permission foundation beneath the Sovereign Machine Economy.
doctrine: Typed state. Signed handoffs. Durable memory. Human authority.
description: A DOM-independent constitutional state machine, typed protocol envelope layer, replaceable deterministic adapters, Ed25519 role identities, append-only IndexedDB chronicle, portable mission bundles, independent bundle verification, and signed human review certificates.

roles.label: Meta-Architect
roles.authority: May propose and charter bounded institutions; cannot execute or settle.

roles.label: Node Operator
roles.authority: May admit resources and emit execution receipts; cannot self-validate.

roles.label: Market Steward
roles.authority: May convene guilds and prepare settlement intent; cannot move value.

roles.label: Independent Verifier
roles.authority: May sign validation opinions and challenge records; cannot execute work.

roles.label: Human Reviewer
roles.authority: May record a scoped review disposition; approval never triggers execution.

envelope_types.purpose: Binds mission, constraints, risk, deliverables, and prohibited actions.
Proposes a bounded multi-agent institution and alternatives.
Seals roles, policies, stop conditions, and authority limits.
Binds node identity, resources, primary route, and shadow route.
Records bounded execution trace, resource ledger, and output commitments.
Seals claims, evidence, contradictions, provenance, and unresolved uncertainty.
Records independent PASS, DISSENT, or REJECT opinions.
Preserves challenge rights, incidents, and remediation posture.
Prepares a non-live settlement waterfall conditioned on review.
Records scope, disposition, expiry, unresolved risks, and revocation rights.

presets.name: Critical Infrastructure Resilience
presets.mission: Design a bounded resilience intervention portfolio for a metropolitan critical-infrastructure network.

presets.name: Cold-Chain Energy Optimization
presets.mission: Produce an evidence-bound cold-chain energy optimization plan with explicit safety and uncertainty limits.

presets.name: Public Health Preparedness
presets.mission: Compile a review-ready preparedness package without making clinical or deployment decisions.

presets.name: Supply Network Foresight
presets.mission: Map systemic bottlenecks and produce falsifiable response options for a regional supply network.

presets.name: Cyber Readiness Evidence Pack
presets.mission: Assemble a non-operational evidence docket for defensive cyber readiness and governance review.

presets.name: Frontier Research Synthesis
presets.mission: Synthesize a contested research landscape with provenance, contradiction, and replication requirements.

invariants: Every state transition is typed and validated before commit.
Every machine-role transition is signed by a distinct local Ed25519 identity.
Every event contains the previous event commitment and cannot rewrite history.
Execution, validation, settlement preparation, and human review remain separate authorities.
Evidence completion never implies factual certification or permission to act.
Human approval records scope; it does not invoke external execution.
Imported bundles are read-only until independently verified.
Corrupted bundles fail closed and remain visibly quarantined.
Memory candidates are expiring, revocable, and never automatically promoted.
Wallets, network calls, model calls, token movement, and external actions remain disabled.

threat_controls.control: Predecessor commitments, content hashes, signatures, and full replay verification.
Five role keys and transition-specific issuer allowlists.
Append-only IndexedDB event store; rollback is represented as a new event.
Independent verifier key, dissent preservation, and challenge window.
Evidence status distinguishes HASHED, SIGNED, EXTERNALLY_ATTESTED, and HUMAN_APPROVED.
Canonical JSON, logical clock, deterministic transition identifiers, and bundle roots.
Schema validation, signature verification, chain replay, and read-only quarantine.
SettlementIntent carries NONE_GRANTED authority and requires a signed HumanReviewCertificate.

claim_boundary: This is an executable browser-local constitutional kernel, not a production deployment.
Local cryptographic signatures prove possession of local role keys, not real-world identity.
Deterministic adapters are replaceable fixtures, not live model or enterprise integrations.
Evidence Dockets organize and commit evidence; they do not certify factual correctness.
Human review certificates record a local disposition and do not authorize external action.
No wallet, RPC endpoint, API key, blockchain transaction, token movement, or external request occurs.
